title: euphorbia × ingezalahiana
intro: Euphorbia × ingezalahiana, a hybrid plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, is commonly known as the 'Inez Lahana' or 'Candelabra Tree'. This succulent plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities, which are derived from its latex and sap. The health benefits of Euphorbia × ingezalahiana include treating wounds, reducing fever, and providing relief from various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's latex and sap are often used to create topical creams, ointments, and salves that can be applied directly to the affected areas to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
